emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] keeps coming back
emails.preview: There's usually a reason it won't go away
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Thanks for completing your health assessment. I noticed [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] has been affecting your daily life, and I want to share something important.

Most people dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] get treatments aimed at the symptom itself. But symptoms are just your body's way of signaling that something deeper needs attention. When we only address what you feel without investigating why you feel it, relief tends to be temporary.

At Integrated Health of Indiana, we use comprehensive lab testing and a functional medicine approach to uncover what's actually driving your symptoms. Whether it's hormone imbalances, inflammation, nutrient deficiencies, or gut dysfunction, we look for the root cause so you can experience lasting improvement.

If you're ready to stop chasing symptoms and start solving problems, we'd love to help.

[BOOKING_LINK]

Dr. Trevor Miller and the IHI Care Team

emails.subject: The real reason standard care misses this
emails.preview: It's not your fault nothing's worked yet
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Imagine your body as a house with a leaky roof. You can keep mopping the floor, but until you fix the roof, the water keeps coming back.

That's what happens with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM]. Standard care often focuses on mopping—managing symptoms with medications or short-term fixes. But if the underlying system (your hormones, gut, immune function, or metabolism) is out of balance, the symptoms will return.

Functional medicine works differently. We run detailed labs to see what's happening at a cellular level. We look at your nutrition, stress, sleep, inflammation markers, and hormone levels. Then we create a plan that addresses the actual source of dysfunction, not just the surface-level complaint.

It's not a quick fix, but it's a real one. And based on your assessment, [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT] suggests [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] could be a helpful starting point.

When you're ready to explore what's really going on, we're here.

The team at Integrated Health of Indiana

emails.subject: How Sarah finally figured it out
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I want to share a story that might sound familiar.

Sarah came to us after two years of dealing with fatigue, brain fog, and digestive issues. She'd tried elimination diets, supplements from the internet, and multiple doctor visits. Nothing stuck.

When we ran her labs, we found thyroid dysfunction, nutrient deficiencies, and gut inflammation—all connected. We built a care plan around those findings: targeted supplementation, nutrition changes, and ongoing monitoring.

Within three months, her energy returned. Her digestion stabilized. She felt like herself again. Every case is different, and results vary, but the pattern is the same: when you address the root cause, your body has a chance to heal.

Your assessment pointed to [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT], and we think there's a real path forward for you too.

If you're tired of guessing and ready for answers, let's talk.

[BOOKING_LINK]

Dr. Trevor Miller and the IHI Team
